description_long: This object is a black, modern-style machine gun with a robust, angular receiver and a prominent curved magazine. The barrel is long and cylindrical, featuring a front sight post and a gas tube above it, typical of military assault rifles. The stock is solid and straight, designed for shoulder support, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly visible, as is the charging handle on the right side. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a tactical, non-reflective appearance. The iron sights are simple, with a rear notch and a front post, and there are no visible mounting rails or bipods.
description: A matte black, modern machine gun with a solid stock, curved magazine, and simple iron sights. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a long cylindrical barrel and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: The machine gun is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the gun, including the curved magazine, solid stock, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the slim profile of the stock and receiver, with the barrel and front sight aligned.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the charging handle, trigger, and the overall silhouette of the weapon.
